learning_outcomes.statement: Explain how Marx’s method of historical materialism is used to analyze capitalism within political economy.
Describe how surplus value is generated in capitalist production using the labor theory of value.
Analyze how capital accumulation contributes to concentration of capital and recurring economic crises in Marx’s account of capitalism.
Evaluate selected Marxian claims about capitalism’s development by comparing them with historical developments since Marx’s time.
related_concepts: Tendency of the Rate of Profit to Fall

learning_outcomes.statement: Assess the contemporary relevance of Marx’s political economy by engaging with critiques of Marxism and modern Marxian analyses.

alignment_notes: Outcomes are aligned to the core concepts and evaluative process identified in the knowledge model and are achievable within an asynchronous one-hour study session.
